title: Figure 6 from: Rathnayaka AR, Chethana KWT, Manowong A, Bhagya AT, Win H, Tun ZL, Mapook A, Hyde KD (2025) Taxonomy, phylogeny, and bioactive potential of Xylariales (Sordariomycetes, Ascomycota) from Thailand: novel species discovery, new host and geographical records, and antibacterial properties. MycoKeys 120: 35-117. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.120.155915
author: Rathnayaka, Achala R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 6 Annulohypoxylon crowfoothodgkiniae on decaying wood of Swietenia macrophylla (MFLU 24-0522, a new host and geographical record). a. Substrate; b, c. Stromata on the host; d. Cross section of the stroma; e. Paraphyses; f–j. Asci; k. Ascus apical apparatus (not stained in Melzer's reagent); l–q. Ascospores; r, s. Colony on PDA (r upper, s lower). Scale bars: 5 mm (b); 1 mm (c); 200 μm (d); 20 μm (e–k); 5 μm (l–q).
